items.title_en: I ported Mac OS X to the Nintendo Wii
items.title_zh: 我把 Mac OS X 移植到了任天堂 Wii
items.summary_en: A personal experiment porting Mac OS X to the Nintendo Wii, outlining the core challenges of cross-hardware porting and what it reveals about software portability. The write-up highlights bootstrapping, driver gaps, and the kinds of trade-offs required when attempting to run a modern OS on a legacy console.
items.summary_zh: 作者进行了将 Mac OS X 移植到任天堂 Wii 的个人尝试，概述了跨硬件移植的核心挑战以及软件可移植性在极端约束下的意义。文章聚焦引导启动、驱动缺口，以及在旧世代主机上运行现代操作系统所需的取舍。

items.title_en: Show HN: Is Hormuz open yet?
items.title_zh: Show HN：Hormuz 开放了吗？
items.summary_en: Show HN project presenting a real-time status page to indicate whether Hormuz is open, illustrating how lightweight dashboards can reveal accessibility in infrastructure experiments.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目提供 Hormuz 是否开放的实时状态页面，展示如何用简单的仪表板跟踪基础设施实验中的可访问性。

items.title_en: Git commands I run before reading any code
items.title_zh: 在读代码前我会执行的 Git 命令
items.summary_en: Before diving into a codebase, I run a concise set of Git commands to map the repo’s history, structure, and hotspots. The routine surfaces remotes, recent commits, file changes, and likely entry points, helping you jump straight to meaningful parts.
items.summary_zh: 在进入代码库前，作者先执行一小组 Git 命令来快速梳理历史、结构与关键区域。这个流程能快速显示远端、最近提交、改动文件以及潜在入口点，帮助开发者直接进入重点代码。

items.title_en: Microsoft terminates VeraCrypt account, halting Windows updates
items.title_zh: 微软突然终止 VeraCrypt 账户，导致 Windows 更新中断
items.summary_en: Reports indicate Microsoft terminated a VeraCrypt account, halting Windows updates. The incident underscores how dependence on external accounts can disrupt critical software maintenance and raises questions about vendor policies.
items.summary_zh: 报道称微软突然终止了VeraCrypt账户，导致Windows更新中断。这一事件凸显对外部账户的依赖如何影响关键软件维护，并引发对厂商政策的关注。

items.title_en: I've been waiting over a month for Anthropic to respond to my billing issue
items.title_zh: 我等了一个多月，Anthropic 对我的计费问题没有回应
items.summary_en: A firsthand account of waiting over a month for Anthropic to respond to a billing issue, highlighting frustrations with support latency and potential implications for business users relying on Claude.
items.summary_zh: 作者描述自己遇到的计费问题在一个月多仍未获得 Anthropic 的回应，凸显企业级支持响应时间的挑战以及对使用 Claude 的客户信任的影响。

items.title_en: US cities are axing Flock Safety surveillance technology
items.title_zh: 美国城市正在削减Flock Safety监控技术
items.summary_en: Multiple U.S. cities are dropping Flock Safety license-plate surveillance programs amid privacy and civil-liberties concerns. The move underscores the tension between public safety aims and individual rights in a surveillance-heavy era.
items.summary_zh: 多座美国城市在隐私与公民自由关注下撤回Flock Safety的车牌监控项目。这一举措凸显了在高强度监控时代，公共安全目标与个人权利之间的张力。

items.title_en: Veracrypt project update
items.title_zh: Veracrypt 项目更新
items.summary_en: The VeraCrypt project provides an update on ongoing maintenance, security fixes, and platform compatibility efforts. The note signals continued commitment to open-source disk encryption, even as development pace remains measured.
items.summary_zh: VeraCrypt 项目发布关于持续维护、安全改进和跨平台支持的更新。尽管进展较为克制，仍表明对开源磁盘加密的长期承诺以及提升用户使用安全性的努力。

items.title_en: John Deere to pay $99M in right-to-repair settlement
items.title_zh: 约翰迪尔就修理权达成9900万美元和解
items.summary_en: A landmark right-to-repair settlement requiring Deere to pay $99 million and to improve access to tools and parts for repairs. The decision could influence OEM practices and consumer rights in agriculture and beyond.
items.summary_zh: 这是一起具有里程碑意义的和解，要求 Deere 支付 9900 万美元并改善修理工具、零件及服务的获取，支持修理权。此举可能影响原厂对外提供维修能力的政策，对农业及其他领域的消费者权利具有示范效应。

items.title_en: USB for Software Developers: An introduction to writing userspace USB drivers
items.title_zh: 面向软件开发者的 USB：用户态 USB 驱动入门
items.summary_en: Introduces the fundamentals of writing USB drivers that run in user space, contrasting them with kernel drivers and outlining common libraries and safety considerations. The piece provides practical steps and a small example to help developers prototype USB interactions quickly.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍在用户空间编写 USB 驱动的基础知识，比较了用户态驱动与内核驱动的差异，讨论常用库与安全注意事项，并给出一个实用的示例实现步骤。

items.title_en: Muse Spark: Scaling towards personal superintelligence
items.title_zh: Muse Spark：向个人超级智能的规模化迈进
items.summary_en: Outlines a framework for scaling AI toward personal-scale intelligence, emphasizing privacy, personalized context, and smarter on-device capabilities. The initiative signals a push to blend private data with scalable models for more capable, private assistants.
items.summary_zh: 概述将 AI 扩展到个人级别智能的框架，强调隐私、个性化上下文以及更智能的本地能力。这一举措旨在将私有数据与可扩展模型结合，打造更强大、更加私密的助理。

items.title_en: The AI Great Leap Forward
items.title_zh: 人工智能的大跃进
items.summary_en: A provocative take on how AI progress could reshape computing, work, and society, discussing acceleration, risks, and governance needs to prepare for wide-scale adoption.
items.summary_zh: 对人工智能发展可能重塑计算、工作与社会的进程进行挑衅性评述，讨论发展速度、潜在风险以及需要的治理与准备。

items.title_en: Understanding the Kalman filter with a simple radar example
items.title_zh: 用一个简单雷达案例理解卡尔曼滤波
items.summary_en: An accessible walkthrough of the Kalman filter using a simple radar example to illustrate the prediction-correction loop and how noisy measurements are fused into a real-time state estimate. The piece ties the method to practical applications in navigation, robotics, and sensor fusion, where uncertainty matters.
items.summary_zh: 通过一个简单雷达示例，直观讲解卡尔曼滤波的预测与校正过程，以及如何将带噪声的观测融合成实时状态估计。内容连接到了导航、机器人和传感器融合等实际应用场景，强调不确定性建模的重要性。

items.title_en: ML promises to be profoundly weird
items.title_zh: 机器学习将带来极其怪异的未来
items.summary_en: Argues that ML systems will exhibit unusual, sometimes counterintuitive behavior as data and objectives shift, complicating testing and reliability. The piece reflects on implications for software engineering, governance, and trust in AI.
items.summary_zh: 指出机器学习系统在数据分布和目标变化下会呈现异常甚至反直觉的行为，这会让测试与可靠性变得复杂。讨论对软件工程、治理与对 AI 信任的影响。

items.title_en: One item purchased, ten emails
items.title_zh: 买一个物品却收到十封邮件
items.summary_en: Describes the flood of post-purchase emails after a single order, highlighting notification fatigue in e-commerce. The piece argues for more respectful, user-controlled communication and smarter messaging strategies.
items.summary_zh: 描述单次购买后收到大量后续邮件的现象，突出电商通知信息的疲劳感。文章主张更尊重用户、可控的沟通方式和更聪明的消息策略。

items.title_en: Claude Managed Agents
items.title_zh: Claude 托管代理
items.summary_en: Claude introduces Managed Agents, a feature to orchestrate multiple AI agents on complex tasks. It enables persistent workflows, shared memory, and higher-level automation, with trade-offs around latency and governance.
items.summary_zh: Claude 推出托管代理，使多位 AI 代理可协同完成复杂任务，支持持久化工作流、共享记忆与更高层级的自动化，同时需要权衡延迟与治理等问题。

items.title_en: Škoda DuoBell: A bicycle bell that penetrates noise-cancelling headphones
items.title_zh: Škoda DuoBell：一枚能穿透降噪耳机的自行车铃
items.summary_en: Škoda's DuoBell uses an audible signal designed to cut through active noise cancellation, ensuring cyclists are noticed. It highlights practical hardware design for urban mobility and how audible cues interact with consumer audio tech.
items.summary_zh: Škoda 的 DuoBell 设计成在主动降噪耳机下仍能发出清晰声音，确保骑行者被听见。该产品凸显城市出行的实用硬件设计，以及可听信号与消费级音频技术的互动。

items.title_en: They're made out of meat (1991)
items.title_zh: 它们都是肉做的（1991）
items.summary_en: Aliens discover humans are meat and struggle to understand Earth's beings; the story uses a stark premise to question assumptions about life, intelligence, and cross-cultural communication. It remains a sharp, classic piece on perspective.
items.summary_zh: 外星人发现人类其实是肉体所构成，他们努力理解地球生命与意识的边界。通过简练又讽刺的情节，质疑关于生命、智能与跨文化沟通的假设。

items.title_en: Project Glasswing: Securing critical software for the AI era
items.title_zh: 玻璃翼计划：为AI时代的关键软件提供安全防护
items.summary_en: Anthropic's Project Glasswing proposes hardened security controls for critical software in AI-enabled environments, addressing supply-chain integrity, code provenance, and runtime protections. The initiative signals a shift toward AI-era security by treating software as an active, risk-prone surface rather than a static asset.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 的 Glasswing 项目提出在 AI 时代加强关键软件的安全控制，覆盖供应链完整性、代码来源可追溯性和运行时防护。该举措标志着安全从静态资产转向对AI驱动环境中高风险表面的主动防护。

items.title_en: Expanding Swift's IDE Support
items.title_zh: 扩展 Swift 的 IDE 支持
items.summary_en: Swift.org is broadening tooling support across IDEs to improve autocompletion, diagnostics, and integration beyond Xcode. This move lowers barriers for Swift adoption in diverse editor workflows and strengthens developer experience.
items.summary_zh: Swift.org 正在扩大对 IDE 的工具支持，提升自动完成、诊断与跨编辑器集成的体验，帮助开发者在多编辑器工作流中更高效使用 Swift。

items.title_en: MegaTrain: Full Precision Training of 100B+ Parameter LLMs on a Single GPU
items.title_zh: MegaTrain：在单个GPU上对1000亿以上参数的LLM进行全精度训练
items.summary_en: Researchers claim to enable full-precision training of models with 100B+ parameters on a single GPU, likely via novel memory management and offload strategies. If real, this could lower the hardware barrier to ultra-large models, but raises questions about training speed, energy use, and practicality in real workloads.
items.summary_zh: 这项研究声称可在单个GPU上对1000亿以上参数的模型进行全精度训练，可能依赖创新的内存管理与数据分流。若属实，将降低超大模型的硬件门槛，但也引发训练速度、能耗与实际可行性的问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Orange Juice – Small UX improvements that make HN easier to read
items.title_zh: Show HN：Orange Juice——让 Hacker News 更易读的小型 UX 改进
items.summary_en: Showcases a set of lightweight UI tweaks that make Hacker News easier to read, reducing clutter and improving typography. The project demonstrates how small, thoughtful design changes can meaningfully improve readability on a text-heavy site.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一组轻量级的用户界面改动，帮助提升 Hacker News 的可读性，减少冗余并优化排版。该项目证明在文本密集的站点上，细致的设计调整也能带来显著的可读性提升。

items.title_en: Iran demands Bitcoin fees for ships passing Hormuz during ceasefire
items.title_zh: 在停火期间，伊朗要求船只通过霍尔木兹海峡缴纳比特币费用
items.summary_en: Iran proposes crypto-based payments, specifically Bitcoin, for ships passing Hormuz during a ceasefire, signaling crypto’s potential role in sanctions-busting and revenue mechanisms amid geopolitics.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗提出在停火期间通过比特币等加密货币向通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取费用，展示加密货币在地缘政治与制裁环境中的潜在作用。

items.title_en: AMD AI director says Claude Code is becoming dumber and lazier since update
items.title_zh: AMD AI 总监称 Claude Code 自更新后变得更笨、更懒
items.summary_en: AMD's AI director notes regression in Claude Code after updates, suggesting that model quality can degrade with rapid iterations. Highlights reliability challenges in fast-moving AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: AMD 的 AI 总监指出 Claude Code 在更新后出现性能下降，表明快速迭代可能带来的质量波动。这揭示了快速变化的 AI 工具在可靠性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: System Card: Claude Mythos Preview [pdf]
items.title_zh: 系统卡：Claude Mythos 预览版 [PDF]
items.summary_en: Claude Mythos Preview introduces new capabilities and safety features in a downloadable PDF, outlining how Mythos handles reasoning, memory, and guardrails in practice. The preview helps developers gauge how this iteration differs from prior Claude releases and where it fits into enterprise workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claude Mythos 预览版以 PDF 形式提供新能力与安全特性，概述 Mythos 在推理、上下文记忆与防护边界方面的实现。该预览有助于开发者评估这一版本与前代区别及在企业工作流中的定位。

items.title_en: Revision Demoparty 2026: Razor1911 [video]
items.title_zh: Revision Demoparty 2026：Razor1911 [视频]
items.summary_en: Razor1911 showcases at Revision Demoparty 2026, captured in a new video. The clips highlight the demoscene’s latest tricks—tight real-time graphics, music synchronization, and compact code tricks—reflecting how modern demos push hardware limits. For readers tracking real-time rendering and compression techniques, this offers a snapshot of current craftsmanship and community energy.
items.summary_zh: Razor1911 在 2026 年 Revision Demoparty 的表演以新视频呈现，展现了高密度的实时图形、音乐同步和极简代码的技巧。片段体现了当代 demoscene 的制作工序与创新能力，以及对硬件极限的持续挑战。对关注实时渲染、编译器优化和边缘计算的技术读者来说，这是一组有启发性的案例。

items.title_en: Lunar Flyby
items.title_zh: 月球飞掠
items.summary_en: NASA recently showcased imagery and data from a lunar flyby, illustrating how spacecraft skim past the Moon to study gravity assists, lighting, and surface features. Such flybys refine trajectory design for future missions and provide rich science visuals for public outreach. They also help calibrate navigation systems used across deep-space operations.
items.summary_zh: NASA 展示来自月球近距飞掠的影像与数据，展示航天器在靠近月球时进行引力辅助、照明与表面特征研究的能力。此类飞掠有助于优化未来任务的轨道设计并为公众科普提供直观的科学画面。它们还用于校准深空任务的导航系统。

items.title_en: US and Iran agree to provisional ceasefire
items.title_zh: 美伊就临时停火达成一致
items.summary_en: After talks, the US and Iran reach a provisional ceasefire, signaling a de-escalation step amid ongoing tensions. The arrangement creates space for negotiations and potential humanitarian corridors, though fragility remains.
items.summary_zh: 经谈判，美伊就临时停火达成协议，表明紧张局势有所缓和。协议为继续谈判和人道主义走廊争取时间，但局势仍不稳固。

items.title_en: Sam Altman may control our future – can he be trusted?
items.title_zh: 萨姆·奥特曼可能掌控我们的未来——能被信任吗？
items.summary_en: Sam Altman's influence over AI policy and development raises questions about the balance of power and accountability in tech leadership. The piece challenges readers to weigh optimism about rapid innovation against safeguards for society, privacy, and equity. Understanding who shapes AI's trajectory matters for engineers and policymakers alike.
items.summary_zh: 萨姆·奥特曼在AI领域的影响力引发关于科技领袖权力与责任平衡的讨论。文章促使读者权衡对快速创新的乐观态度与对社会、隐私和公平的保障之间的取舍。理解谁在塑造AI的未来，对工程师与政策制定者都至关重要。

items.title_en: Protect your shed
items.title_zh: 保护你的花园小木棚
items.summary_en: Practical steps to secure a garden shed against theft and weather. It also offers tips on organizing and storing tools safely to reduce risk.
items.summary_zh: 提供一系列针对花园小木棚的安全措施，帮助防盗并应对天气。内容包括选择坚固的锁具、强化门、安装照明和监控，以及通过放置位置来降低被盗风险，同时给出整理与存放工具的实用建议。

items.title_en: GLM-5.1: Towards Long-Horizon Tasks
items.title_zh: GLM-5.1：迈向长时域任务
items.summary_en: GLM-5.1 advances long-horizon reasoning, aiming to improve task planning and sustained context handling in large language models. The update signals continued the trend toward more capable multi-step problem solving, useful for complex workflows.
items.summary_zh: GLM-5.1 在长期推理能力上取得进展，提升任务规划与长上下文处理。该更新延续了让大型语言模型进行多步推理、处理复杂任务的趋势，对需要跨长文档的应用尤为有用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Brutalist Concrete Laptop Stand (2024)
items.title_zh: Show HN：极简混凝土笔记本支架（2024）
items.summary_en: A concrete laptop stand with brutalist aesthetics. The project probes how weight, heat, and form affect desk use and suggests unconventional materials can redefine everyday peripherals.
items.summary_zh: 这款混凝土笔记本支架以极简混凝土风格呈现，强调重量与稳固性对桌面使用的影响，同时引发关于热管理和日常周边产品材料选择的讨论。

items.title_en: Who is Satoshi Nakamoto? My quest to unmask Bitcoin's creator
items.title_zh: 谁是中本聪？我揭开比特币创始人真身的追寻
items.summary_en: Adam Back's profile in the New York Times traces attempts to uncover Satoshi Nakamoto's true identity, weighing rumored candidates and the evidentiary curve.
items.summary_zh: 纽约时报刊文回顾 Adam Back 的追踪，试图揭示中本聪的真实身份，评估候选人及相关证据。报道揭示了这场追寻如何交织密码学史、隐私议题，以及比特币创始人神话的形成。

items.title_en: Show HN: We fingerprinted 178 AI models' writing styles and similarity clusters
items.title_zh: Show HN：我们对178个AI模型的写作风格进行指纹识别并聚类
items.summary_en: The project fingerprints writing styles across 178 AI models and clusters them by similarity. This helps with model attribution and provenance checks, and could aid in detecting model reuse, though it also raises concerns about privacy and misuse.
items.summary_zh: 该工作对178个AI模型的写作风格进行指纹提取，并据此提出相似性聚类。对于溯源与检测模型复用有帮助，但也带来隐私与滥用方面的担忧。

items.title_en: Show HN: I pipe free sports streams into Jellyfin – no ads, just HLS
items.title_zh: Show HN：我把免费体育直播推送到 Jellyfin——无广告，只有 HLS
items.summary_en: A Show HN post describes piping free sports streams into Jellyfin via an HLS restream proxy, enabling ad-free, self-hosted viewing. It discusses practicality and potential legality of aggregating free streams into a personal media server.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 分享了通过HLS中继代理将免费体育流推送到Jellyfin，实现无广告的自托管观看。文中谈及 practicality 与将免费流聚合到自建媒体服务器的潜在合规性。

items.title_en: Cambodia unveils statue to honour famous landmine-sniffing rat
items.title_zh: 柬埔寨为著名排雷鼠揭幕雕像
items.summary_en: Cambodia unveiled a statue honoring Magawa, the famed mine-detection rat credited with saving lives through demining work. The tribute highlights animal contributions to humanitarian efforts and ongoing risk in post-conflict areas.
items.summary_zh: 柬埔寨为著名排雷鼠 Magawa 揭幕雕像，以表彰其在排雷行动中挽救生命的功绩。该纪念体现了动物在人道主义行动中的重要作用，也凸显战后地区持续的安全风险。

items.title_en: S3 Files
items.title_zh: S3 文件与 S3 的新面貌
items.summary_en: Cloud storage remains dominated by S3, but the service is evolving beyond a pure object store. The piece surveys new file-like semantics, tiering options, and API changes that blur the line between object storage and traditional file systems. These shifts have practical implications for developers and operators weighing cost, performance, and data management strategies.
items.summary_zh: S3 依然主导云存储，但服务正在向更丰富的文件化语义、分层存储和跨区域能力发展，模糊了对象存储与传统文件系统的边界。这些变化给开发者和运维带来更灵活的存取模式，同时也带来成本与性能权衡。

items.title_en: We moved Railway's frontend off Next.js. Builds went from 10+ mins to under 2
items.title_zh: Railway 的前端从 Next.js 移走，构建时间从十多分钟降至两分钟内
items.summary_en: Railway relocated its frontend away from Next.js, slashing build times from over 10 minutes to under two. The move likely relies on a leaner toolchain or bundler choices, enabling faster iteration and deployment at scale, though it may shift maintenance and migration costs.
items.summary_zh: Railway 将前端从 Next.js 迁出，构建时间从十多分钟降至两分钟以下。此举很可能依赖于更精简的工具链或打包方案，提升了大规模迭代与部署的速度，但也伴随维护与迁移成本的变化。

items.title_en: Show HN: Go-Bt: Minimalist Behavior Trees for Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Go-Bt：Go语言的极简行为树
items.summary_en: A minimalist Behavior Tree library for Go that enables building AI agents with simple, composable blocks. It’s useful for game AI, robotics, or simulations implemented in Go.
items.summary_zh: 一个为Go设计的极简行为树库，便于用简单、可组合的模块构建AI代理。适合用Go实现的游戏AI、机器人或仿真。

items.title_en: Show HN: TUI-use: Let AI agents control interactive terminal programs
items.title_zh: Show HN：TUI-use——让 AI 代理控制交互式终端程序
items.summary_en: Show HN for a project that lets AI agents control interactive terminal programs. It demonstrates automating CLI workflows with natural-language interfaces, with implications for productivity and reproducibility, plus security considerations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 的一个项目，将 AI 代理用于控制交互式终端程序。展示了通过自然语言界面对命令行工作流的自动化潜力，提升生产力与可重复性，同时需关注安全性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Explore the Silk Roads through an interactive map
items.title_zh: Show HN：通过互动地图探索丝绸之路
items.summary_en: An interactive map lets users explore Silk Road routes, trade hubs, and historical context with geospatial visuals. It provides a tangible way to study ancient globalization and networked exchange.
items.summary_zh: 一个互动地图让用户通过地理信息和历史情境直观探索丝绸之路的路线、节点及贸易网络，为研究古代全球化提供直观工具。

items.title_en: Show HN: An interactive map of Tolkien's Middle-earth
items.title_zh: 托尔金中土互动地图
items.summary_en: An interactive map of Middle-earth lets fans explore locations, routes, and lore overlays, bringing Tolkien’s geography to life in the browser. The project showcases practical data modeling for fictional worlds and approachable, immersive UI.
items.summary_zh: 这款托尔金中土互动地图让用户在浏览器中探索地点、路线以及相关设定，生动呈现虚构世界的地理格局。它展示了对虚构世界进行数据建模的思路，以及实现沉浸式 UI 的可行性。

items.title_en: Cloudflare targets 2029 for full post-quantum security
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 将在 2029 年实现全面后量子安全
items.summary_en: Cloudflare outlines a path to post-quantum security by 2029, with phased deployment and testing. The planning reflects industry urgency around quantum threats and crypto agility.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 提出到 2029 年实现全面后量子安全的路线图，包含分阶段部署与测试。这反映出业界对量子威胁与加密灵活性的紧迫关注。

items.title_en: Dropping Cloudflare for Bunny.net
items.title_zh: 放弃 Cloudflare 改用 Bunny.net
items.summary_en: The post documents migrating from Cloudflare to Bunny.net, citing performance and simpler configuration. It reflects a trend toward leaner edge services and more auditable networks.
items.summary_zh: 记录从 Cloudflare 迁移到 Bunny.net 的过程，理由包括性能和更简化的配置。这反映出向更轻量化的边缘服务与更可审计网络的趋势。

items.title_en: Assessing Claude Mythos Preview's cybersecurity capabilities
items.title_zh: 评估 Claude Mythos 预览版的网络安全能力
items.summary_en: Anthropic evaluates the Mythos Preview's cybersecurity posture, examining guardrails, threat modeling, and resilience to prompt-based abuse. The findings help users gauge risk in deployment and identify trade-offs between safety and performance.
items.summary_zh: 对 Mythos 预览版的网络安全态势进行评估，涵盖防护边界、威胁建模及对提示滥用的韧性等方面。结果有助于用户在部署时衡量风险并理解安全性与性能之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Show HN: BAREmail ʕ·ᴥ·ʔ – minimalist Gmail client for bad WiFi
items.title_zh: BAREmail ʕ·ᴥ·ʔ——为差网速设计的极简 Gmail 客户端
items.summary_en: Introduces BAREmail, a minimalist Gmail client designed for bad WiFi with offline support and lean UI. It emphasizes resilience against flaky networks and a focused email experience.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 BAREmail——为差网速设计的极简 Gmail 客户端，具离线支持与精简界面，强调在不稳定网络环境下的鲁棒性与专注的邮件体验。

items.title_en: How Costco Won in Japan
items.title_zh: Costco 在日本取胜的原因
items.summary_en: A business analysis of Costco's success in Japan, covering localization, membership model, and supply-chain adaptations that helped win in a challenging market. The piece distills lessons for retailers expanding into culturally different markets.
items.summary_zh: 分析 Costco 在日本市场的成功要点，涵盖本地化策略、会员制与供应链调整，以及在文化差异显著的市场中的应对之道，供零售商借鉴。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gemma 4 Multimodal Fine-Tuner for Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Gemma 4：Apple Silicon 的多模态微调器
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 is a multimodal model fine-tuner designed to run on Apple Silicon, enabling on-device training and fine-tuning without sending data to the cloud. It emphasizes practical on-device ML workflows, performance and privacy, opening up experiments for hobbyists and researchers.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 是为 Apple Silicon 设计的多模态模型微调工具，支持在设备端进行模型微调，无需将数据上传云端。它强调本地化的 ML 工作流、性能与隐私优势，为爱好者和研究者提供更便捷的实验途径。

items.title_en: Taste in the age of AI and LLMs
items.title_zh: AI 与大语言模型时代的品味
items.summary_en: Explores how AI and LLM-driven recommendations influence taste across media and culture, from recipes to art. The piece warns about homogenization and dependency on algorithmic curation, offering ideas to maintain agency.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 AI 和大语言模型驱动的推荐如何影响我们的口味和选择，涉及音乐、艺术、饮食等领域。警示同质化风险与对算法依赖，并提出保持自主审美的思考方向。

items.title_en: Mario and Earendil
items.title_zh: 马里奥与埃兰迪尔
items.summary_en: An essay drawing cross-media comparisons between Mario and Earendil to explore mythmaking, heroism, and navigation across games and high fantasy, highlighting shared storytelling devices.
items.summary_zh: 通过对马里奥与埃兰迪尔的跨媒介对照，探讨英雄叙事、航行与神话建构等主题，揭示不同媒介中的共通讲述手法。

items.title_en: Rescuing old printers with an in-browser Linux VM bridged to WebUSB over USB/IP
items.title_zh: 用浏览器中的 Linux 虚拟机，借助 WebUSB/USB/IP 拯救老印表机
items.summary_en: A project bridges old printers to modern machines by running a Linux VM inside the browser and exposing it via WebUSB/USB/IP, letting legacy hardware print without vendor drivers. The approach unlocks long-tail devices for web-enabled environments and showcases browser-based hardware emulation.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目通过在浏览器中运行 Linux 虚拟机并通过 WebUSB/USB/IP 暴露，连接并驱动老旧打印机，无需厂商驱动即可打印。这种在浏览器层实现的硬件仿真方法，为长期积压的设备重新获得可用性。

items.title_en: Every GPU That Mattered
items.title_zh: 每一代都重要的显卡
items.summary_en: A visual tour of GPUs that shaped the industry, tracing milestones from early graphics cards to modern accelerators and their impact on gaming, AI, and computation.
items.summary_zh: 以数据可视化方式梳理对行业影响深远的显卡里程碑，从早期显卡到现代加速器，揭示其对游戏、人工智能和计算领域的贡献。

items.title_en: Xilem – An experimental Rust native UI framework
items.title_zh: Xilem：一个实验性的 Rust 原生 UI 框架
items.summary_en: Xilem is an experimental Rust-native UI framework targeting high performance and clean abstractions with native widgets and minimal runtime overhead. It appeals to developers seeking efficient, low-level UI tech in Rust.
items.summary_zh: Xilem 是一个实验性的 Rust 原生 UI 框架，致力于提供高性能、简洁的抽象和原生控件。项目强调最小运行时开销和跨平台潜力，吸引对本地界面开发感兴趣的开发者。

items.title_en: Google open-sources experimental agent orchestration testbed Scion
items.title_zh: 谷歌开源实验性代理编排测试平台 Scion
items.summary_en: Google open-sources Scion, an experimental agent orchestration testbed to study how autonomous agents coordinate tasks, manage safety constraints, and interact with tools. The project aims to accelerate research into reliable agent ecosystems and safe AI automation.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌开源了 Scion，一套用于实验的代理编排测试平台，研究自治代理如何协同、遵循安全约束并与工具交互。该项目意在加速对可靠代理生态和安全自动化的研究。

items.title_en: Show HN: Skrun – Deploy any agent skill as an API
items.title_zh: Show HN：Skrun——将任意代理技能部署为 API
items.summary_en: Showcases Skrun, a tool that deploys any agent skill as an API, enabling developers to expose autonomous agent capabilities as HTTP endpoints and orchestrate tool usage easily.
items.summary_zh: 展示 Skrun，一个将任意代理技能部署为 API 的工具，便于开发者将自主代理能力以 HTTP 接口暴露并简化工具的编排。

items.title_en: Bitcoin and quantum computing
items.title_zh: 比特币与量子计算
items.summary_en: Quantum computers could threaten current Bitcoin cryptography; Shor's algorithm could break ECDSA Secp256k1, prompting the need for post-quantum signatures. The timeline is uncertain, but preparations underway, including exploring quantum-resistant schemes and migration paths. The takeaway is that plans for a upgrade-safe, quantum-ready Bitcoin ecosystem are prudent.
items.summary_zh: 量子计算可能破坏比特币当前的加密机制，强量子计算机可能在将来解开私钥签名。为此，需要部署抗量子密码方案并考虑网络升级与迁移路径，具体时间仍存在不确定性。文章讨论了风险、对策和行业准备。

items.title_en: Audio Reactive LED Strips Are Diabolically Hard
items.title_zh: 声音反应LED灯带异常难搞
items.summary_en: The author dives into the challenges of building audio-reactive LED strips. Real-time audio analysis, color mapping, and hardware limitations create timing and perceptual traps that frustrate makers.
items.summary_zh: 作者深入分析声音响应LED灯带的实现难点：实时音频分析、颜色映射与硬件限制共同带来时序与感知的挑战，常让自制爱好者陷入困境。

items.title_en: Sonnet 4.6 Elevated Rate of Errors
items.title_zh: Sonnet 4.6：错误率提升
items.summary_en: Status page notes an elevated error rate for Sonnet 4.6, indicating an outage or degraded performance in the Claude service line. The incident underscores the fragility of AI services and the importance of operational resilience and incident response.
items.summary_zh: 状态页显示 Sonnet 4.6 的错误率上升，表明 Claude 服务出现中断或性能下降。此次事件凸显 AI 服务的易损性，以及建立运维韧性和有效应急机制的重要性。

items.title_en: JSIR: A High-Level IR for JavaScript
items.title_zh: JSIR：面向 JavaScript 的高级中间表示
items.summary_en: JSIR proposes a high-level intermediate representation for JavaScript to improve compiler optimizations and cross-tooling. It aims to bridge JS engines with LLVM-like backends, enabling more portable and aggressive optimizations while preserving JS semantics.
items.summary_zh: JSIR 提出一种面向 JavaScript 的高级中间表示，旨在提升编译器优化与跨工具链的能力。它试图将 JS 引擎与类似 LLVM 的后端衔接，以实现更可移植、且更具侵袭性的优化，同时保留 JavaScript 的语义。

items.title_en: The demise of software engineering jobs has been greatly exaggerated
items.title_zh: 软件工程岗位的消亡并未如传闻般高估
items.summary_en: Argues that concerns about AI decimating software engineering jobs are overblown; AI will augment engineers, shifting skills toward systems design, reliability, and integration.
items.summary_zh: 认为关于 AI 会大规模吞并软件工程岗位的担忧被高估，AI 将以辅助方式增强工程师能力，技能需求将向系统设计、可靠性与集成等领域转变。

items.title_en: A truck driver spent 20 years making a scale model of every building in NYC
items.title_zh: 一名卡车司机花20年制作纽约市所有建筑的缩尺模型
items.summary_en: A truck driver spent two decades building a precise scale model of every building in New York City, turning a lifelong hobby into a remarkable urban panorama. The project blends craftsmanship with data-driven representation, offering a personal, tangible record of a living city.
items.summary_zh: 一名卡车司机花了20年时间，逐座复制纽约市的所有建筑，做成精密的缩尺模型。这项手工与数据结合的工程，成为对这座活城的一部独特、可触及的记录。

items.title_en: Has electricity decoupled from natural gas prices in Germany?
items.title_zh: 德国电价是否已脱离天然气价格？
items.summary_en: It investigates whether German electricity prices have decoupled from natural gas prices, with results suggesting a growing separation driven by renewables and structural market reforms. The finding has implications for consumer bills, energy policy, and hedging strategies.
items.summary_zh: 分析显示，德国电价可能正逐步与天然气价格脱钩，这与可再生能源扩大、市场改革等因素有关。此现象对家庭电费、能源政策及对冲策略具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Moving fast in hardware: lessons from lab to $100M ARR
items.title_zh: 硬件领域快速推进：从实验室到亿美元 ARR 的教训
items.summary_en: A hardware founder shares lessons on shipping fast without sacrificing reliability, emphasizing the need to simplify designs, iterate rapidly, and align product-market fit with scalable manufacturing. The trajectory from lab prototyping to a hundred-million ARR underscores discipline in execution.
items.summary_zh: 一位硬件创始人分享如何在不牺牲可靠性的前提下快速出货，强调简化设计、快速迭代以及与可扩展生产的市场契合。该从实验室原型到亿美元级年收入的路径，体现的是执行中的自律。

items.title_en: How to get better at guitar
items.title_zh: 如何把吉他弹得更好
items.summary_en: Clear, actionable guidance on improving guitar skills through deliberate practice, focused repetition, and mindful listening. The piece emphasizes structured routines, metronome work, and recording oneself to identify and fix mistakes, helping players progress faster.
items.summary_zh: 提供一套清晰可执行的练习方法，强调有目的的练习、专注重复和用心聆听。文章建议使用节拍器、分段练习并录音回放，以识别并纠正错误，从而更高效地提升演奏水平。

items.title_en: Move Detroit
items.title_zh: Move Detroit 项目
items.summary_en: Move Detroit acts as a civic tech program aimed at improving mobility, transit access, and urban life in Detroit. It typically brings together residents, local government, and tech partners to pilot data-driven transport solutions.
items.summary_zh: Move Detroit 是一个公民科技计划，旨在改善底特律的出行、交通可达性和城市生活。它通常汇集居民、地方政府和科技伙伴，推动数据驱动的交通方案试点。

items.title_en: LLM plays an 8-bit Commander X16 game using structured "smart senses"
items.title_zh: LLM 使用结构化“智能感知”玩8位Commander X16游戏
items.summary_en: An LLM plays an 8-bit Commander X16 game using structured 'smart senses' to perceive the game state and decide actions. The work demonstrates progress in giving language models interpretable inputs for emulator-based tasks.
items.summary_zh: LLM利用结构化的“智能感知”来感知8位Commander X16游戏的状态并选择行动，展示了语言模型在仿真器任务中的可解释输入能力的进展。

items.title_en: John Coltrane illustrates the mathematics of jazz
items.title_zh: 约翰·科尔特兰：揭示爵士的数学
items.summary_en: John Coltrane's improvisational approach is framed as a mathematical system, offering a lens into the structures behind jazz harmony and rhythm. The piece connects music theory, data visualization, and performance practice to illuminate creativity.
items.summary_zh: 把约翰·科尔特兰的即兴演奏视为一种数学体系，揭示爵士乐和声与节奏背后的结构。这一视角将音乐理论、数据可视化与演奏实践结合，展示创造力的深层机制。

items.title_en: You can't cancel a JavaScript promise (except sometimes you can)
items.title_zh: 你不能取消 JavaScript 的 Promise（有时可以）
items.summary_en: JavaScript promises cannot be cancelled natively, but patterns exist to emulate cancellation such as AbortController and cancellation tokens.
items.summary_zh: JavaScript 的 Promise 原生不能取消，但可以通过 AbortController 等模式实现“取消”效果。文中解析了实际应用中的坑点与可靠控制流的常用做法。

items.title_en: A blind man made it possible for others with low vision to build Lego sets
items.title_zh: 盲人帮助低视力者搭建乐高积木
items.summary_en: A blind innovator developed accessible Lego-building instructions using audio descriptions and tactile cues, enabling others with low vision to build sets. The project expands inclusive play, helping more kids engage with STEM and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 一位盲人倡议者开发了可访问的乐高搭建说明，结合音频描述与触觉线索，使视力受限者也能组装乐高积木，推动包容性游戏与 STEM 兴趣。

items.title_en: IPv6 is the only way forward
items.title_zh: IPv6 将成为未来唯一出路
items.summary_en: Argues IPv6 is essential for the future as IPv4 exhaustion accelerates, with practical steps for deployment and the advantages of a larger address space and improved security features.
items.summary_zh: 认为随着 IPv4 地址枯竭加速，IPv6 是未来的必要之路，文中给出部署要点并强调更大的地址空间和改进的安全特性带来的优势。

items.title_en: Teardown of unreleased LG Rollable shows why rollable phones aren't a thing
items.title_zh: 未发布的LG可卷曲手机拆解：为何可卷曲手机难成气候
items.summary_en: A teardown of an unreleased LG rollable phone reveals mechanical complexity, reliability concerns, and cost drivers that hinder mainstream adoption. The insights explain why rollables haven't yet taken off in the market.
items.summary_zh: 对未发布的LG可卷曲手机进行拆解，显示出机械复杂性、可靠性风险与高成本等因素，解释了为何这类设备还未走向主流。

items.title_en: The Image Boards of Hayao Miyazaki
items.title_zh: 宫崎骏的影像板
items.summary_en: An examination of Miyazaki's image boards, the visual planning tools used to sketch scenes and camera work. The boards reveal how early composition decisions, motifs, and storytelling cues evolved through meticulous planning behind Studio Ghibli's animation.
items.summary_zh: 本文解读宫崎骏的影像板——用于分镜与构图的视觉规划工具，揭示关键场景的前期构思如何通过细致的布局、主题和色彩规划逐步形成。

items.title_en: AI helps add 10k more photos to OldNYC
items.title_zh: AI 让 OldNYC 增添一万张照片
items.summary_en: AI augmentation adds about 10,000 new photos to OldNYC, expanding the historical record of New York through computer vision and data curation. The update enhances accessibility for researchers and hobbyists exploring urban change.
items.summary_zh: 通过 AI 增强，OldNYC 增添约1万张新照片，扩充纽约市历史记录。此更新提升了研究者与爱好者在研究城市变迁时的可访问性。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Any interesting niche hobbies?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：有哪些有趣的冷门爱好？
items.summary_en: A long-running Ask HN thread inviting readers to share niche hobbies. The responses reveal a wide range of pursuits and can inspire side projects or new skills for techies.
items.summary_zh: 一个长期的 Ask HN 帖子，征求读者分享冷门爱好。讨论覆盖从实用手工到技术兴趣的多样领域，或能为个人项目和技能扩展带来灵感。

items.title_en: Your File System Is Already A Graph Database
items.title_zh: 你的文件系统其实已经是一个图数据库
items.summary_en: The piece argues that a filesystem naturally forms a graph, with folders, files, symlinks, and metadata creating nodes and edges. Viewing FS through a graph lens suggests new data-querying approaches directly on storage.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出文件系统本质上就是一个图，目录、文件、符号链接与元数据共同构成节点和边。用图数据库思维去查询文件系统，可能带来对存储中关系的新洞察。

items.title_en: Show HN: Unicode Steganography
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unicode 隐写术
items.summary_en: Show HN project demonstrates using Unicode characters to hide data inside plain text, exploring practical techniques and detection challenges. The project reveals how subtle typographic tricks can convey payloads, suggesting both novelty and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目展示了如何在纯文本中利用 Unicode 字符进行隐写，将数据隐藏在看似普通的文本里，并探讨了检测的难点。该方案揭示了打字排版中的微妙技巧所能承载的载荷，同时带来新颖性与安全性方面的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: 500k+ events/sec transformations for ClickHouse ingestion
items.title_zh: Show HN：用于 ClickHouse 导入的 50万+ 事件/秒转换
items.summary_en: Show HN detailing a pipeline capable of transforming more than 500k events per second for ClickHouse ingestion, including architecture and efficiency considerations for high-throughput analytics.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 介绍一个可实现每秒超过 50 万事件转换以用于 ClickHouse 导入的流水线，讨论其架构与高吞吐分析工作负载下的性能考量。

items.title_en: Binary obfuscation that doesn't kill LTO
items.title_zh: 不会破坏 LTO 的二进制混淆
items.summary_en: Describes a binary obfuscation approach that preserves Link Time Optimization, showing how security can be bolstered without sacrificing performance or compile-time benefits.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一种在不损害链接时优化（LTO）的前提下实现的二进制混淆方法，展示如何在不牺牲性能与编译时优化的情况下提升安全性。

items.title_en: A whole boss fight in 256 bytes
items.title_zh: 用 256 字节实现完整 Boss 战
items.summary_en: A code-golf style achievement compressing a complete boss fight into just 256 bytes. It showcases extreme minification techniques and how careful data representation and control flow can fit a full game inside a tiny footprint.
items.summary_zh: 一项极致代码高尔夫的成就：用仅 256 字节实现一个完整的 Boss 战。展示了极致压缩技法，以及通过精简数据结构和控制流在极小的体积内表达完整游戏的可能性。

items.title_en: Show HN: We built a camera only robot vacuum for less than 300$ (Well almost)
items.title_zh: 我们用摄像头打造的机器人吸尘器，价格不足300美元（几乎）
items.summary_en: A camera-only robot vacuum prototype demonstrates a low-cost autonomous cleaner under $300. While-costs are appealing, navigation and mapping trade-offs highlight practical limits of camera-only autonomy.
items.summary_zh: 一个仅用摄像头的机器人吸尘器原型，成本声称低于300美元。尽管成本具吸引力，但导航与地图构建等方面的取舍也显现出摄像头单一方案的现实局限。

items.title_en: Wildlife Conservation Police Are Searching Flock Cameras for ICE
items.title_zh: 野生动物保护警察正从 Flock 摄像头中搜索 ICE 数据
items.summary_en: Wildlife-conservation police are querying Flock cameras for ICE data, illustrating tensions between public safety, private surveillance networks, and civil liberties. The piece questions governance and consent in a shared surveillance landscape.
items.summary_zh: 野生动物保护警察正在从Flock摄像头中检索ICE数据，揭示公共安全、私有监控网络与公民自由之间的紧张关系。文章质疑在共用监控环境中的治理与同意问题。

items.title_en: SQLite in Production: Lessons from Running a Store on a Single File
items.title_zh: 生产环境中的 SQLite：单文件店铺的教训
items.summary_en: A practical look at using SQLite in production from a storefront perspective: single-file DB, migrations, performance, and reliability lessons.
items.summary_zh: 从餐饮/小型商店场景出发，分享在生产环境使用 SQLite 的经验教训：单文件数据库、迁移、性能与可靠性要点。

items.title_en: Union types in C# 15
items.title_zh: C# 15 中的联合类型
items.summary_en: C# 15 adds union types to support discriminated unions and safer pattern matching. The change improves expressiveness for branching logic and can reduce boilerplate in data-heavy scenarios.
items.summary_zh: C# 15 引入联合类型，支持判别式联合与更安全的模式匹配。此改动提高了分支逻辑的表达能力，能在数据密集场景中减少样板代码。

items.title_en: How the Vision Pro Rollout Inflamed Tensions at Apple
items.title_zh: Vision Pro 推出如何点燃苹果内部紧张局势
items.summary_en: An excerpt reveals internal debates and frictions at Apple during the Vision Pro rollout, including disagreements over product strategy, resource allocation, and organizational culture. The piece sheds light on how a bold new product line can stress existing processes even in a hardware giant.
items.summary_zh: 书摘揭示 Vision Pro 推出过程中苹果内部的分歧与紧张，包括对产品策略、资源分配和组织文化的不同意见。文章透视了在硬件巨头内部，一条大胆的新产品线如何给现有流程带来压力。

items.title_en: Running out of disk space in production
items.title_zh: 生产环境磁盘空间告罄
items.summary_en: A production launch runs into disk space exhaustion, with notes on symptoms, root causes, and fixes. The piece emphasizes proactive storage planning and instrumentation to avoid similar outages.
items.summary_zh: 一次上线过程中遇到磁盘空间耗尽，文中记录了现象、根因与解决办法。强调提前的存储规划和监控对避免类似故障的重要性。

items.title_en: Understanding Traceroute
items.title_zh: 理解 traceroute 的工作原理
items.summary_en: A practical primer on how traceroute works: TTL-based probing, ICMP responses, and interpreting hop data. It also notes limitations like firewall filtering and path asymmetry that can mislead troubleshooting.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 traceroute 的工作机制：通过基于生存时间的探测、ICMP 响应以及对跳点数据的解读。也指出防火墙、路径不对称等局限，可能使故障排查出现偏差。

items.title_en: Slightly safer vibecoding by adopting old hacker habits
items.title_zh: 通过采用老派黑客的做法让 vibecoding 更安全
items.summary_en: Revisits old hacker habits to make vibecoding safer.
items.summary_zh: 通过借鉴早期黑客的做法来提升 vibecoding 的安全性。

items.title_en: A database of analog cameras that can be 3D printed
items.title_zh: 可3D打印的胶片相机数据库
items.summary_en: An open database hosts CAD files for 3D-printable analog camera parts and bodies, enabling hobbyists to reproduce or repair vintage gear. The project democratizes access to classic photography hardware, though quality and legal considerations remain.
items.summary_zh: 一个收录可3D打印的胶片相机部件与机身的数据库，便于爱好者复制或修复复古设备。该项目让经典摄影硬件的获取更为民主，但在质量与版权方面仍需注意。

items.title_en: Native Americans had dice 12k years ago
items.title_zh: 美洲原住民1.2万年前已有骰子
items.summary_en: Archaeologists report 12,000-year-old dice from North America, indicating that dice gaming and probabilistic thinking have deep roots on the continent. The find adds nuance to our view of prehistoric leisure and mathematics, suggesting complex social play was present far earlier than previously thought.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家发现北美地区早于一万两千年的骰子，表明该地区早在史前就有掷骰游戏和概率思维。此发现为人们对原始娱乐和数学思维的理解增添新细节，显示在此前人类社会就已进行复杂的共同游戏。

items.title_en: The Clock
items.title_zh: 时钟
items.summary_en: A contemplative piece about the nature of time, expressed through a clock-themed project.
items.summary_zh: 以钟为核心的项目探讨时间的本质。

items.title_en: Pgit: I Imported the Linux Kernel into PostgreSQL
items.title_zh: Pgit：我把 Linux 内核导入 PostgreSQL
items.summary_en: Demonstrates importing Linux kernel data into PostgreSQL, enabling storage, querying, and versioning of kernel concepts within SQL. Highlights how OS data in a relational database context can aid research, tooling, and reproducibility.
items.summary_zh: 展示将 Linux 内核数据导入 PostgreSQL，实现对内核概念的存储、查询与版本控制。凸显在关系数据库环境中处理操作系统数据对研究、工具链开发和结果可重复性的潜在价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a navigation app that displays weather along the route
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个在路线沿线显示天气的导航应用
items.summary_en: A navigation app that overlays weather along the route, helping users anticipate conditions. The project touches on data freshness, performance, and UX trade-offs for map apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个在导航路线沿线显示天气的应用，帮助用户提前预判出行条件。项目涉及数据新鲜度、性能以及地图应用中的用户体验取舍。

items.title_en: The Harvard Library Passport
items.title_zh: 哈佛图书馆护照计划
items.summary_en: The Harvard Library Passport concept proposes portable tokens or stamps to access resources, balancing open standards with privacy controls. It invites reflection on digital identity in research infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 哈佛图书馆护照计划提出使用便携令牌/凭证来访问资源，力求在开放标准与隐私控制之间取得平衡。引发对研究基础设施中数字身份的思考。

items.title_en: Virtual Mars Traverse: Every inch of Curiosity rover's path since 2012 landing
items.title_zh: 虚拟火星穿越：自 2012 年着陆以来好奇号轨迹的逐寸展示
items.summary_en: An interactive visualization that maps Curiosity rover's path inch-by-inch since its 2012 landing, offering insights into mission planning, terrain challenges, and how movement data translates into science goals.
items.summary_zh: 一个互动可视化，逐寸展示自 2012 年着陆以来好奇号在火星上的轨迹，揭示任务规划、地形挑战，以及如何将移动数据转化为科学目标。

items.title_en: Hobby CNC machining and resin casting (2015)
items.title_zh: 业余 CNC 加工与树脂铸造（2015）
items.summary_en: A 2015-era hobbyist note detailing CNC milling and resin casting techniques, tools, and projects. It serves as a historical snapshot of DIY fabrication practices and the gap between hobbyist experiments and professional manufacture.
items.summary_zh: 2015年的业余笔记，讲述CNC加工与树脂铸造的技巧、工具与项目，为DIY制造实践的历史快照，以及业余尝试与专业制造之间的差距。

items.title_en: Why do Macs ask you to press random keys when connecting a new keyboard?
items.title_zh: Mac 在连接新键盘时为何要你按下任意按键？
items.summary_en: Explains the rationale behind macOS prompting random key presses when pairing a new keyboard, including device verification, key mapping calibration, and anti-spoofing considerations.
items.summary_zh: 解释 macOS 在连接新键盘时要求按任意键的原因，涵盖设备验证、按键映射校准以及防伪攻击的考量。

items.title_en: A Digital Compute-in-Memory Architecture for NFA Evaluation
items.title_zh: 用于 NFA 评估的数字化就地计算架构
items.summary_en: Presents a digital compute-in-memory architecture tailored for fast NFA evaluation, with potential improvements to regex matching and automata processing. The work benchmarks show throughput and energy trade-offs.
items.summary_zh: 提出面向 NFA 评估的数字化就地计算架构，旨在提升正则匹配与自动机处理的效率，并给出吞吐量与能耗等权衡的初步评估。

items.title_en: Study investigates how mass distribution of baseball bat affects performance
items.title_zh: 研究调查棒球棒质量分布对表现的影响
items.summary_en: A study investigates how mass distribution in baseball bats affects performance, with findings supporting end-weight designs and their impact on swing dynamics, relevant for equipment design and analytics.
items.summary_zh: 研究探讨棒球棒的质量分布如何影响击球表现，结果支持末端配重设计对挥杆动力学的影响，对装备设计与数据分析具有参考价值。

items.title_en: What does ⍋⍋ even mean? (2023)
items.title_zh: ⍋⍋ 到底是什么意思？（2023）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on the APL grade operator, clarifying its semantics with concrete examples and tracing how ⍋⍋ behaves in data sorting and grouping. Provides historical context to demystify the symbol for modern readers.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 APL 中 grade 运算符⍋⍋的语义，通过具体示例阐明其在排序与分组中的行为，并追溯其历史背景，帮助现代读者理解这一符号。

items.title_en: ACE on a USB-HDMI Adapter
items.title_zh: 在 USB‑HDMI 适配器上的 ACE
items.summary_en: Demonstrates running ACE on a USB‑HDMI adapter, showcasing hardware‑level compatibility and potential for compact AI or compute tasks on consumer hardware. The experiment hints at how off‑the‑shelf adapters could support lightweight workloads without dedicated GPUs.
items.summary_zh: 在 USB‑HDMI 适配器上实现 ACE 的演示，展示了商用硬件的兼容性及在小型设备上执行轻量化工作负载的潜力。该实验暗示了现成适配器在不依赖专用 GPU 的情况下也能支持某些计算任务的可能性。

items.title_en: An Arctic Road Trip Brings Vital Underground Networks into View
items.title_zh: 北极公路之行让重要地下网络浮出水面
items.summary_en: An Arctic road trip reveals hidden underground infrastructures—like fiber cables and energy lines—across remote terrain, highlighting how such networks survive and are mapped in extreme conditions. The story shows how data collection and on-site exploration can illuminate the resilience and vulnerability of critical infrastructure in the Arctic.
items.summary_zh: 一次北极公路探险让偏远地区的地下网络暴露在公众视野之内，包括光纤和能源线等关键基础设施。通过实地勘测与数据采集，文本揭示极端环境下网络的韧性与脆弱性，以及在极地条件下进行监测的挑战。
